title: hieracium murorum subsp. sartonsicum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. sartonsicum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium murorum subsp. sartonsicum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal effects, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
